title: Slovakian Chicken Goulash
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired dish featuring tender chicken in a flavorful goulash sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the chopped dates, caraway seeds, and cayenne pepper (if using).
Add the Slovakian sausage and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the pot and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with shredded crisp.
